reporter_identity_note: exact email match b.researcher@secfirm.io is the reporter of #102
rationale: Only one axis matches #102: bug_class (path traversal). Component differs (HTTP operator vs SFTPHook), attack_path differs (redirect-follow to file:// vs remote_path argument), fix_shape differs (redirect scheme allowlist vs path sanitisation). Normally one axis = NO_MATCH, but reporter identity hit on a related issue upgrades the floor to MEDIUM — the team should decide whether this is a sibling vector or a separate tracker.
